topics.name: Array.prototype.map
topics.description: Transform arrays manually. Recreate .map() to project data into a new array without mutating the original

topics.name: Array.prototype.filter
topics.description: Sift through data. Build a function that returns a subset of elements matching a specific condition

topics.name: Array.prototype.reduce
topics.description: The ultimate accumulator. Implement the most powerful array method to boil down a list into a single value

topics.name: Function.prototype.bind
topics.description: Lock the context. Recreate .bind() to explicitly set 'this' for a function regardless of how it is called later

topics.name: Deep Clone
topics.description: Clone without references. Traverse a nested structure to create a fully independent copy of complex objects

topics.name: Flatten Array
topics.description: Flatten the hierarchy. Recursively lift nested elements to create a single-level array from a deep tree

topics.name: Currying Function
topics.description: Transform arity. Convert a function taking multiple arguments into a sequence of nested unary functions

topics.name: Object.assign Polyfill
topics.description: Merge properties. Manually copy enumerable keys from source objects to a target object

topics.name: Memoization Utility
topics.description: Cache the results. Build a wrapper that remembers previous inputs to skip expensive recalculations

topics.name: Instanceof Operator
topics.description: Walk the prototype chain. Manually verify if an object inherits from a specific constructor's prototype

topics.name: Get Value by Path
topics.description: Navigate safely. Retrieve nested properties using a string path like 'user.profile.name' without crashing

topics.name: Typeof Exact
topics.description: Fix the types. Distinguish between null, array, object, and date better than the native typeof operator
